name: task_submit_review
description:
Submit a human review decision for a task in needs-review status. Approve
merges the task worktree and transitions to done (after verification gates).
Reject discards the worktree, appends reviewer feedback to
extensions.review.feedback, and returns the task to todo for a fresh
regeneration. Revise keeps the worktree (branch + uncommitted edits),
appends feedback, and returns the task to todo for a targeted in-place
correction.

task_id.description: Canonical task ID (t_XXXXXXXX). Must be in needs-review status.

decision.description: Review decision. 'approve' merges and completes. 'reject' discards the worktree and restarts from scratch. 'revise' preserves the worktree and applies a targeted correction. Takes precedence over 'approved' when both are sent.

approved.description: Deprecated; use 'decision'. True maps to 'approve', false to 'reject'. Ignored when 'decision' is provided.

comment.description: Reviewer comment — required when rejecting or revising, optional when approving.

what_was_wrong.description: Specific description of what the implementation got wrong (used when rejecting or revising to guide the next attempt).
